caption: A man identified as "नीतीश कुमार, CM, बिहार" stands outdoors surrounded by other men in suits and formal wear, speaking into several microphones, including one with an "ANI" logo. He wears a white shirt and a dark vest. To his right, several other men look on, some identified by on-screen text as "विजेंद्र यादव" and "श्रवण कुमार." The scene is overlaid with news graphics from "NEWS 18 इंडिया," featuring a red and yellow color scheme. A headline reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and another states "सब्र्राट चौधरी, विजय सिन्हा को भी PM ने बधाई दी." Small portrait photos of officials appear on the sides of the screen. As the sequence progresses, the labels for the men change; "सब्र्राट चौधरी" and "विजय सिन्हा" are highlighted in red boxes. The time stamp "10:04 PM" and a "MAHARASHTRA" tag remain constant throughout the frames.
